category_sources: source_facts.description says object-oriented, actor-model, capabilities-secure programming language; official Pony site https://www.ponylang.io/discover/ describes Pony the same way.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ponyc and source_facts.executables include ponyc; official Pony site describes the Pony language and its compiler tooling at https://www.ponylang.io/use/.
docs_sources: Official Pony usage documentation: https://www.ponylang.io/use/; official tutorial is linked from Pony materials as https://tutorial.ponylang.io/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ponylang/ponyc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Pony language properties; source_facts.executables include ponyc, pony-doc, pony-lint, and pony-lsp; official use page covers development tools.
